hero.title: The 90-Day Revenue Partnership
hero.subtitle: We don't coach. We architect. In 90 days, your revenue systems will run while you sleep.

tiers.name: Done-For-You
tiers.subtitle: We build it. You own it.
tiers.description: Full revenue system architecture built by our team. You focus on running your business while we engineer your growth machine.

tiers.name: Done-With-You
tiers.subtitle: We guide. You build.
tiers.description: Hands-on partnership where we architect the blueprint and guide your team through implementation. You build the muscle memory.

tiers.name: Do-It-Yourself
tiers.subtitle: The blueprint. Your pace.
tiers.description: Complete access to our curriculum, templates, and tools. Self-paced with community support.

curriculum.description: Diagnose your current stage and identify your top 3 leaks.
Build visibility engines that put you in front of the right people.
Design frictionless pathways from stranger to buyer.
Turn first-time buyers into repeat customers.
Maximize what comes in — pricing, upsells, cross-sells.
Build loyalty loops that compound over time.
Remove yourself from the bottleneck positions.
What gets measured gets managed — build your dashboard.
Train your team to run the systems without you.
Identify what to keep, what to delegate, what to automate.
Pressure-test your systems before going full speed.
Go live, measure results, and iterate.
